channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🟡 Dossier 2026-05-15 — NORMAL · Gold: BMO
item.description:
🟡 NORMAL · SPY ▲ 0.8% · VIX 18.8

The market's quiet on the surface, VIX sitting normal at 18.

🥇 Gold Pick: BMO — Score: 48/100 (A)

📡 167 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"Keep it simple. If your thesis needs a whiteboard and three footnotes, it's not a thesis — it's a hope." — Sam
